title: A Glycosylation-Dependent Checkpoint Restrains Intestinal Intra-Epithelial Lymphocyte Activation
author: Cheng, Liqing
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Feces were collected from Gcnt2 Het or KO mice, followed by fecal bacterial DNA extraction, amplification and sequencing at Lausanne Genomic Technologies facility. Mice information: 
 cage 1: Het-1, KO-1, male 
 cage 2: KO-2, KO-3, KO-4, male 
 cage 3: Het-3, Het-4, Het-5, KO-5, KO-6, male 
 cage 4: Het-6, Het-7, KO-8, female 
 cage 5: Het-2, KO-7, male 
 cage 6: Het-8, Het-9, KO-10, KO-11, female
steps_raw:
